title: englerina schubotziana
intro: Englerina schubotziana, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, is a shrub native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Englerina schubotziana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for its medicinal uses.
